mapper.update: UPDATE review SET order_id = #{orderId}, order_item_id = #{orderItemId}, product_id = #{productId}, sku_id = #{skuId}, user_id = #{userId}, store_id = #{storeId}, rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, images = #{images}, status = #{status}, like_count = #{likeCount}, reply_count = #{replyCount}, reply_content = #{replyContent}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM review ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE review SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE review SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_count = reply_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
